title: X makes it 1,900 percent more expensive to post links
summary: X increased API costs for posting links from $0.01 to $0.20 per link—a 1,900% increase that makes third-party posting tools significantly more expensive. The move may further discourage publishers from sharing news on the platform, amid debate over whether link-posting impacts reach.
content:
Posting links to X through custom social media software just got a lot more expensive. On Monday, X significantly increased how much it costs to post a URL via the X API, which is what third-party tools use to hook into the platform. It now costs $0.20 when a link is posted, up from $0.01.
Any change to make posting links more expensive will likely make X even less attractive to publishers than it already is, especially given the widely held suspicion that linking news articles can lower a post's reach. The issue came up in a recent spat between Nate Silver and X's head of product, Nikita Bier, who claimed that links are "not deboosted." Bu …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: X将发布链接的成本提高1,900%
zh.summary: X将发布链接的API成本从0.01美元提高到0.20美元，增幅达1,900%，这使第三方发布工具成本大幅增加。这一举措可能会进一步阻止发布商在该平台上分享新闻，引发关于链接发布是否影响覆盖范围的辩论。

title: Framework announces Laptop 13 Pro, ‘the MacBook Pro for Linux users’
summary: Framework unveiled its Laptop 13 Pro, featuring a fully machined aluminum chassis, haptic trackpad, and custom 13.5-inch 3:2 display with variable refresh rates (30-120Hz). The laptop aims to address previous Framework models' battery life and build quality concerns.
content:
Gorilla arm who? | Image: Framework	

Every time we review a Framework laptop, we find familiar pros and cons. They're truly upgradable, incredibly repairable, but we always wish the battery lasted longer. We always wish the build quality were top notch.  
Today, Framework is announcing what could be the answer: the Framework Laptop 13 Pro.
It's the company's first laptop to be fully machined out of blocks of 6000-series aluminum, its first with a haptic trackpad, and its first with a fully custom 13.5-inch, 3:2, 2.8K, variable refresh rate (30-120Hz) IPS screen that comes color-calibrated right out of the box. 
With the option to order it preloaded with Ubuntu instead of onl …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Framework推出Laptop 13 Pro，"Linux用户的MacBook Pro"
zh.summary: Framework推出了Laptop 13 Pro，配备全铝制机箱、触觉触控板和定制的13.5英寸3:2显示屏，刷新率可变（30-120Hz）。该笔记本电脑旨在解决之前Framework型号的电池续航和制造质量问题。

title: Framework’s first eGPUs turn its laptop into a desktop PC
summary: Framework is launching external GPUs via its new OCuLink Dev Kit, allowing users to upgrade video cards or add desktop-class graphics to the Laptop 16 with eight lanes of PCIe bandwidth. The external GPU module approach extends Framework's modularity philosophy beyond internal components.
content:
Remember when Framework made the first laptop where you can easily upgrade its entire internal video card in three minutes flat? The company's getting into the external graphics game, too. As promised last August, you'll be able to turn the Framework Laptop 16's GPU modules into external ones instead. Or, you can plug in a desktop graphics card (or network card, or other PCIe cards) for more power than most laptops ever dream of having, with eight lanes of PCI-Express bandwidth. 
Framework's calling it the OCuLink Dev Kit, because it uses the OCuLink standard to transmit data between your CPU and the external GPU, and because the company wa …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Framework首款外置GPU将笔记本电脑变成台式PC
zh.summary: Framework通过其新的OCuLink开发工具包推出外置GPU，允许用户升级视频卡或为Laptop 16添加桌面级显卡，具有八通道PCIe带宽。该外置GPU模块方法将Framework的模块化理念扩展到内部组件之外。

title: Framework is building a better couch keyboard because everyone hates the Logitech one
summary: Framework CEO Nirav Patel announced the company is developing a wireless keyboard with trackpad to replace what he calls the universally disliked Logitech K400, arriving later this year. The new keyboard aims to improve on the ubiquitous but poorly regarded peripheral.
content:
If you have a wireless keyboard with a touchpad that lets you control your PC from across the room, chances are it's a Logitech K400. Framework CEO Nirav Patel is betting that you hate using it - enough to buy Framework's spin on the idea when it arrives later this year. 
He says that Logitech's keyboard is precisely the reason he's building a new one: "It's that Logitech keyboard that everybody owns and nobody likes," he tells me. "Everybody's got the same keyboard, nobody likes that keyboard, and so we figured we can build a better keyboard." 
When I heard him say this in an interview, it was a joy. That's partly because Patel is one of  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Framework正在开发一款更好的沙发键盘，因为每个人都讨厌罗技的那款
zh.summary: Framework首席执行官Nirav Patel宣布公司正在开发一款带触控板的无线键盘，用以取代他所称的普遍不受欢迎的罗技K400，将于今年晚些时候推出。新键盘旨在改进这款无处不在但口碑不佳的外设。

title: The AirPods are Tim Cook’s most underrated achievement
summary: The original AirPods fundamentally transformed the true wireless earbud market and became Apple's most important accessory under Tim Cook's 15-year tenure. Despite their industry impact, AirPods are underrated in retrospectives of Cook's achievements at Apple.
content:
The AirPods changed the direction of true wireless earbuds and became Apple’s most important accessory. | Photography by Amelia Holowaty Krales / The Verge	

Apple Silicon chips. The iPhone's dominance. Apple Vision Pro. During Tim Cook's 15-year tenure as Apple CEO there were highs - and in the case of the Vision Pro, maybe a low - that helped define Apple as one of the most dominant forces in tech even without Steve Jobs. But one product doesn't get the recognition it deserves, as evidenced by The Verge's Apple Top 50 products, where the original AirPods don't even crack the top 10.
Before AirPods, almost all earbuds were still wired back to your phone or iPod. Apple's ads leaned into the aesthetic with vibrant neon backdrops to frame dark, dancing silhouettes connected by the iconic, stark wh …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: AirPods是蒂姆·库克最被低估的成就
zh.summary: 最初的AirPods从根本上改变了真正无线耳机市场，在蒂姆·库克15年的任期内成为苹果最重要的配件。尽管其行业影响力巨大，AirPods在对库克在苹果成就的回顾中仍被严重低估。

title: A look at Tim Cook’s 15-year legacy as CEO of Apple
summary: Tim Cook succeeded Steve Jobs as Apple CEO in 2011 and transformed the company into a $4 trillion powerhouse through strategic leadership spanning two decades at the company.
content: Cook, who joined Apple in 1998, succeeded Steve Jobs as CEO in 2011 and went on to transform Apple into a $4 trillion powerhouse.

zh.title: 蒂姆·库克担任苹果首席执行官15年遗产的回顾
zh.summary: 蒂姆·库克在2011年接替史蒂夫·乔布斯担任苹果首席执行官，通过在公司任职二十年间的战略领导，将其转变为价值4万亿美元的强大企业。

title: Celebrities will be able to find and request removal of AI deepfakes on YouTube
summary: YouTube expanded its AI deepfake detection feature to celebrities, allowing them to search for and request removal of AI-generated videos of themselves, similar to protections offered to politicians and journalists. Takedown requests are evaluated against YouTube's privacy policy and not all are guaranteed approval.
content:
YouTube is expanding its AI deepfake monitoring feature to Hollywood - meaning some celebrity AI videos could soon disappear.
The platform's likeness detection feature searches YouTube for AI deepfake content and flags it for public figures enrolled in the program. Public figures can use it to keep track of AI content on YouTube of themselves or request removal (takedowns are evaluated against YouTube's privacy policy, and not every request will be approved). YouTube began testing the feature with content creators last fall; in March, the company expanded the program to politicians and journalists. YouTube says the tool will cover celebriti …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 名人将能够在YouTube上查找并请求删除AI深度伪造视频
zh.summary: YouTube将其AI深度伪造检测功能扩展到名人，允许他们搜索并请求删除自己的AI生成视频，类似于对政客和记者提供的保护。删除请求根据YouTube的隐私政策进行评估，并非所有请求都能获得批准。

title: Twelve South’s magnetic PowerBug charger is down to just $35
summary: Twelve South's PowerBug, a dual-device wall charger supporting MagSafe and USB-C, is on sale for $35.05 (down $15), and doubles as an iPhone stand with Apple Standby mode support. The compact design eliminates cable clutter while charging two devices simultaneously.
content:
Twelve South’s PowerBug supports Apple’s Standby mode, which allows you to turn your phone into an ad hoc smart display. | Image: Twelve South	

If you’re tired of dealing with a cluttered desk or nightstand, the Twelve South PowerBug cuts down on cables by plugging directly into the wall and handling multiple devices at once. And right now, it’s down to a new low price, starting at $35.05 ($15 off) at Amazon.
Twelve South PowerBug

Where to Buy:

 $49.99 $35.05 at Amazon (black)
 $49.99 $46.26 at Amazon (white)

All you need to do is plug it in, and it turns any wall outlet into a charger that can power two devices at once, without the clutter of loose cables and bulky wall chargers. The 15W Qi2 pad wirelessly charges MagSafe-compatible iPhones and other Qi2 devices, while a 35W USB-C Power Delivery port underneath simultaneously handles a second gadget. That means you can stick it next to your bed and charge your phone overnight while topping up your AirPods, or use it at your desk to keep your phone in view while your tablet charges underneath.
Aside from charging, it also doubles as a phone stand with support for Apple’s StandBy mode, letting you use your iPhone to display the time or upcoming calendar events at a glance. Because it holds your phone in place, it’s also convenient for hands-free FaceTime calls, keeping an eye on notifications, or following along with a workout or recipe without having to hold it.

zh.title: Twelve South的磁性PowerBug充电器降至仅35美元
zh.summary: Twelve South的PowerBug是一款支持MagSafe和USB-C的双设备壁挂充电器，售价35.05美元（降低15美元），同时可作为iPhone支架使用，支持Apple待机模式。紧凑的设计消除了电缆杂乱，同时可为两个设备充电。

title: Govee’s new rechargeable table lamp is less than half the price of Hue’s
summary: Govee released a rechargeable table lamp for $79.99—less than half the price of Philips Hue's Go lamp at $175.99—with 500 lumens brightness versus Hue's 370 lumens, though with shorter 30-hour battery life. For indoor use, Govee's option offers significantly better value.
content:
Nearly four years after Philips Hue launched its Go portable table lamp, Govee has announced its own version for less than half the price. While the Hue Go is currently listed for $175.99, the new Govee Table Lamp Classic has launched at $79.99. Assuming you're okay with never using it outside, Govee's alternative may be the better buy.
Govee's cordless lamp is a bit brighter producing up to 500 lumens of light compared to just 370 lumens from Hue's. However, being dimmer allows the Hue lamp to run for up to 48 hours without external power, while the Govee's 4,800mAh battery will only last for up to 30 hours with colored lighting, or up to  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Govee的新型可充电台灯价格不到Hue的一半
zh.summary: Govee推出了一款价格为79.99美元的可充电台灯，不到飞利浦Hue Go灯175.99美元价格的一半，亮度为500流明而Hue为370流明，但电池续航时间较短仅30小时。对于室内使用，Govee的选项提供了更好的价值。

title: The Mac is in good hands in Apple’s post-Cook era
summary: Apple's Mac line, once troubled by the butterfly keyboard, USB-C transition, and underperforming Intel chips, has entered a golden era since transitioning to Apple Silicon in 2020 with more capable chips and design prioritization. The platform's revival marks a dramatic turnaround from the Cook era's earlier challenges.
content:
The Mac reached a series of low points in the Tim Cook era: the fiasco of the butterfly keyboard, the clunky transition to USB-C, the underutilized potential of the Touch Bar, and the occasionally lackluster Intel chip performance. For a while, it seemed like Apple had shifted all of its attention, innovation, and care toward the iPad. For Mac users, it was a rough stretch of time.
And then, with the transition to Apple Silicon in 2020, everything changed. The line was revitalized with hugely capable new chips, and Apple began prioritizing usability over thinness at all costs. The Mac is now in a new golden era, and yesterday's changes at A …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Mac在苹果后库克时代前景光明
zh.summary: 苹果Mac系列曾因蝶式键盘、USB-C过渡和英特尔芯片性能不足而陷入困境,但自2020年过渡到苹果硅后进入了黄金时代,拥有性能更强的芯片和设计优先级。这一平台的复兴标志着从库克时代早期挑战的戏剧性转变。

title: Clarifai deletes 3 million photos that OkCupid provided to train facial recognition AI, report says
summary: Clarifai deleted 3 million photos that OkCupid provided for training facial recognition AI, following an FTC settlement after executives with OkCupid ties requested the data sharing in 2014. The deletion resolves legal issues around unauthorized use of dating app user photos.
content: The photo deletion comes after an FTC settlement with Clarifai. The company had asked OkCupid — whose executives had invested in Clarifai — to share data in 2014, according to court documents.

zh.title: 据报道,Clarifai删除了OkCupid提供的用于训练面部识别AI的300万张照片
zh.summary: Clarifai删除了OkCupid为训练面部识别AI提供的300万张照片,这是在与FTC达成和解后进行的,当时与OkCupid有关联的高管在2014年要求进行数据共享。这一删除行为解决了围绕未经授权使用约会应用用户照片的法律问题。

title: Wearable health tech might be Tim Cook’s greatest legacy
summary: The Apple Watch, released during Tim Cook's tenure as Apple CEO, fundamentally shaped modern health technology and wearables, and may ultimately define Cook's legacy more than iPhones or Vision Pro. Cook has himself emphasized Apple's health tech contributions as the company's most important long-term impact.
content:
The Apple Watch was the first new product in the post-Jobs era.	

An apple a day keeps the doctor away. Granted, 19th-century proverb writers were talking about the fruit, but Tim Cook helped give new meaning to the adage with the release of the very first Apple Watch. In fact, I'd argue that when he hands the reins to John Ternus in September, it won't be iPhones, Macs, AirPods, or the Vision Pro that defines Cook's legacy. It'll be how the Apple Watch set the course for modern health tech.
You don't have to take my word for it. In 2019, Cook himself told told Mad Money host Jim Cramer, "…If you zoom out into the future, and you look back, and you ask the question, 'What was Apple's greatest contribution …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 可穿戴健康科技可能是蒂姆·库克最伟大的遗产
zh.summary: Apple Watch在蒂姆·库克担任Apple CEO期间发布,从根本上塑造了现代健康技术和可穿戴设备,并可能最终比iPhone或Vision Pro更能定义库克的遗产。库克本人强调苹果的健康科技贡献是公司最重要的长期影响。

title: Anthropic gets $5B investment from Amazon, will use it to buy Amazon chips
summary: Anthropic secured a $5 billion investment from Amazon and committed to purchasing 5 gigawatts of Amazon's custom silicon chips to support growing Claude AI demand. The investment strengthens Anthropic's computational infrastructure as AI adoption accelerates.
content: Anthropic secures 5 gigawatts of Amazon’s custom silicon as Claude demand soars.

zh.title: Anthropic获得亚马逊50亿美元投资，将用于购买亚马逊芯片
zh.summary: Anthropic获得了亚马逊50亿美元的投资，并承诺购买5吉瓦的亚马逊定制硅芯片以支持不断增长的Claude AI需求。该投资加强了Anthropic的计算基础设施，因为AI采用在加速。

title: Former Pinterest team redesigns email with Extra — and it’s actually good
summary: Former Pinterest designers and engineers launched Extra, an email platform that reorganizes the inbox around user life and priorities rather than traditional message threading. The redesigned email client offers a genuinely improved approach to email management.
content: Extra, from a team of former Pinterest designers and engineers, reimagines email around your life instead of the traditional inbox.

zh.title: 前Pinterest团队用Extra重新设计电子邮件——而且确实很好用
zh.summary: 前Pinterest设计师和工程师推出了Extra，一个电子邮件平台，围绕用户生活和优先级而非传统消息线程来重新组织收件箱。重新设计的电子邮件客户端提供了一种真正改进的电子邮件管理方法。

title: AI Dungeon maker Latitude unveils Voyage, a platform for creating AI-powered RPGs
summary: Latitude, the creator of AI Dungeon, announced Voyage, a new AI-native platform enabling users to design and create their own AI-powered role-playing games. The platform democratizes game creation by leveraging AI for dynamic gameplay generation.
content: Latitude's new AI-native platform, Voyage, aims to help gamers create their very own role-playing game.

zh.title: AI Dungeon制造者Latitude推出Voyage，一个创建AI驱动RPG的平台
zh.summary: AI Dungeon的创作者Latitude宣布推出Voyage，一个新的AI原生平台，使用户能够设计和创建自己的AI驱动角色扮演游戏。该平台通过利用AI进行动态游戏生成来实现游戏创作民主化。

title: Apple will have a product guy as CEO again
summary: John Ternus is Apple's new CEO, replacing Tim Cook who focused on logistics. Ternus is a product-focused executive who previously led hardware engineering and served as the public face for major product announcements. His appointment signals Apple's return to product-centric leadership.
content:
John Ternus is going to be Apple's next CEO. And while outgoing CEO Tim Cook was lauded for his approach to logistics, Ternus' history is that of a product person.
Ternus, Apple's SVP of hardware engineering before being officially tapped to take over the top job, has been increasingly in the public eye to help Apple announce its latest products. Ternus helped introduce the iPhone Air last September, its flashiest new iPhone of the 2025 lineup. He's also been the face of announcing new Macs for years, including Apple's first Macs with Apple Silicon in 2020 that profoundly transformed Apple's computer lineup, continuing through the 15-inch M …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 苹果将再次由产品人士担任CEO
zh.summary: 约翰·特努斯是苹果的新任CEO，取代专注于物流的蒂姆·库克。特努斯是一位专注于产品的高管，曾领导硬件工程部门，并在重大产品发布中充当公众代表。他的任命标志着苹果回归产品为中心的领导。

title: Global growth in solar "the largest ever observed for any source"
summary: Solar energy generation has reached unprecedented growth levels, representing the fastest expansion of any energy source on record. The Energy Information Agency says the world has entered an "Age of Electricity" driven by renewable energy growth. This marks a major shift in global energy infrastructure toward clean power sources.
content: The Energy Information Agency says we've entered the Age of Electricity.

zh.title: 全球太阳能增长创历史纪录，"有史以来任何能源观测到的最大增长"
zh.summary: 太阳能发电已达到前所未有的增长水平，代表了有史以来任何能源源的最快扩张。能源信息署称世界已进入由可再生能源增长驱动的"电气时代"。这标志着全球能源基础设施向清洁能源的重大转变。

title: Yelp’s updated AI assistant can answer questions and book a restaurant or service in one conversation
summary: Yelp has upgraded its AI assistant to handle multiple tasks in a single conversation, including answering restaurant questions and booking tables or placing orders. The enhancement turns the platform into a digital concierge service. Users can now accomplish dining reservations and orders without leaving the app.
content: Yelp said that users can ask questions about a restaurant and place an order or book a table in one conversation

zh.title: Yelp更新后的AI助手可以在一次对话中回答问题并预订餐厅或服务
zh.summary: Yelp已升级其AI助手，可在一次对话中处理多个任务，包括回答餐厅问题、预订餐桌或下单。这一增强使该平台成为数字礼宾服务。用户现在可以在不离开应用的情况下完成用餐预订和下单。

title: Yelp is making its AI chatbot way more useful
summary: Yelp is redesigning its AI chatbot to be at the center of the app experience, allowing users to ask questions, get recommendations, and complete bookings in one conversation. This upgrade positions the platform as a full-service digital concierge. The move reflects the broader industry trend of making AI more practical and actionable for consumers.
content:
Yelp is giving its chatbot assistant a major upgrade, turning the platform into something closer to a digital concierge with a suite of new features designed for "getting things done." The move, one of several AI-focused updates in recent months, is part of a broader industry push to make AI more relevant and practically useful to consumers while turning huge troves of user-generated data into a competitive edge. 
In a press release, Yelp says the Yelp Assistant chatbot will be at "the center of the app experience," where it can answer questions, make recommendations, and even handle bookings in a single conversation. The bot will be availa …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Yelp正在让其AI聊天机器人变得更加有用
zh.summary: Yelp正在重新设计其AI聊天机器人，使其成为应用体验的中心，允许用户提问、获取建议和完成预订，所有这些都在一个对话中完成。这次升级使该平台定位为全方位的数字礼宾服务。这一举措反映了更广泛的行业趋势，即使AI对消费者更实用和可行。

title: Blue Energy raises $380M to build grid-scale nuclear reactors in shipyards
summary: Blue Energy has raised $380 million to manufacture grid-scale nuclear reactors in shipyards. The company argues that building reactors in existing shipyards will reduce costs and unlock cheaper financing for nuclear power. This approach aims to address nuclear energy's historically high capital costs.
content: By building reactors in shipyards, Blue Energy says it will tame nuclear power's cost problems, giving it access to cheaper financing.

zh.title: Blue Energy融资3.8亿美元在造船厂建造电网级核反应堆
zh.summary: Blue Energy筹集了3.8亿美元用于在造船厂制造电网级核反应堆。该公司辩称，在现有造船厂建造反应堆将降低成本并为核能获得更便宜的融资。这一方法旨在解决核能历来高资本成本的问题。

title: Microsoft Teams is trying to fix accidental hand-raising
summary: Microsoft is redesigning Teams to move the "raise hand" button from the main toolbar to under the Reactions button, reducing accidental activations. The update aims to prevent embarrassing interruptions when users accidentally raise their hands during meetings. The redesign is expected to roll out in June 2026.
content:
If you've ever had the embarrassing displeasure of interrupting a Microsoft Teams meeting by accidentally hitting the "raise hand" feature, then I have some good news for you. Microsoft is redesigning its online meeting software, which will move the raise hand button from the main toolbar and allow users to personalize the controls displayed there.
The update was announced on the Microsoft 365 Roadmap and is expected to roll out sometime in June this year. The changes will group the Raise Hand feature under the Reactions button "to reduce mis-clicks," according to Microsoft, which is handy because the two functions are easy to conflate at a …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Microsoft Teams正在尝试修复误操作的举手功能
zh.summary: Microsoft正在重新设计Teams，将"举手"按钮从主工具栏移到"反应"按钮下方，以减少误触发。这次更新旨在防止用户在会议中误操作举手时出现尴尬的中断。该重新设计预计将在2026年6月推出。

title: Ikea and Samsung promise glitch-free Matter integration
summary: Samsung's SmartThings platform has resolved integration issues with Ikea's Matter-over-Thread devices, which previously suffered from connectivity and compatibility problems. Samsung built enhanced integrations with Ikea's remote controls, bulbs, sensors, and smart plugs. The platforms have now validated compatibility to ensure seamless operation within automation routines.
content:
Samsung makes Ikea’s lineup feel native inside SmartThings, not like generic Matter devices. | Image: Samsung	

Ikea's two dozen Matter-over-Thread devices have proved problematic since launch, but Samsung says its SmartThings platform now has it all sorted. If true, it means Ikea's sensors and complex remotes should actually display correctly, function flawlessly, and plug directly into Samsung's advanced home automation routines without any issues. 
To achieve this, Samsung says it has "built enhanced integrations" with Ikea's scroll wheel remote, bulbs, smart plugs, and sensors for temperature, humidity, air quality, motion, water, and open doors and windows. Furthermore, "Samsung and Ikea conducted multiple rounds of validation to enhance connect …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Ikea和Samsung承诺实现无故障的Matter集成
zh.summary: Samsung的SmartThings平台已解决与Ikea的Matter-over-Thread设备的集成问题，这些设备之前存在连接和兼容性问题。Samsung为Ikea的遥控器、灯泡、传感器和智能插头构建了增强的集成。这两个平台现已验证兼容性，以确保在自动化例程中实现无缝运行。

title: Apple Sports now lets you follow scores in a CarPlay widget
summary: Apple Sports now supports widgets in CarPlay, allowing drivers to track live sports scores and league schedules directly on their vehicle displays. The update includes both league-specific and team-specific widgets that display live scores within iOS 26 CarPlay. Users can follow their favorite teams and sports without switching apps while driving.
content:
The Apple Sports widget for iOS. | Image: Apple	

I was disappointed when Apple launched a new Sports iOS widget last year without CarPlay support, but I'm pleased to report that's changing this week. The latest Apple Sports update includes widget support in CarPlay, allowing you to follow live sports scores for your favorite teams or leagues all within the new widgets interface in the iOS 26 version of CarPlay.
You can pick between a league widget that shows live scores and schedules for a league or sport you're interested in, or a teams widget, which follows your favorite teams. Both widgets will show live scores, but they don't appear to update in real time. I tested the widget during t …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Apple Sports现在可以让你在CarPlay小工具中跟踪比分
zh.summary: Apple Sports现在在CarPlay中支持小工具，让驾驶员可以直接在车辆显示屏上跟踪实时体育比分和联赛日程。该更新包括在iOS 26 CarPlay中显示实时比分的联赛特定和球队特定小工具。用户可以在驾驶时跟踪他们喜欢的球队和体育项目，而无需切换应用程序。

title: PlayStation’s age-gating restrictions are coming to UK consoles
summary: Sony is implementing age verification requirements for UK and Irish PlayStation users starting June 2026, in compliance with the Online Safety Act. Users who don't verify their age won't be able to use voice chat, messaging, parties, or broadcast features. PlayStation gameplay will remain accessible, but social and streaming capabilities will be restricted.
content:
Sony is starting to comply with the UK's Online Safety Act by notifying PlayStation players of its age verification requirements today. PS4 and PS5 owners in the UK and Ireland won't be able to participate in voice chats, messaging, parties, or other third-party communication services from June unless they verify their age.
"Beginning June 2026, if you have not completed age verification, you can continue playing on PlayStation, but some features won't be available until you verify your age," says Sony in a support note. Age verification will also be required for broadcasting features or sharing gameplay to YouTube or Twitch from a PlayStat …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: PlayStation的年龄限制即将在英国游戏机上推出
zh.summary: Sony正在为英国和爱尔兰PlayStation用户实施年龄验证要求，从2026年6月开始，以符合《在线安全法案》。未验证年龄的用户将无法使用语音聊天、消息传递、派对或广播功能。PlayStation游戏玩法将保持可用，但社交和流媒体功能将受到限制。

title: Dyson’s back with a travel-size Supersonic hairdryer
summary: Dyson has launched a travel-size version of its Supersonic hairdryer for $299.99, featuring 32% smaller dimensions, 25% lighter weight, and automatic voltage adaptation for international use. The premium positioning continues Dyson's dominance in high-end hair care technology.
content:
Ten years ago, Dyson kicked off the hair gadget arms race with its $400 Supersonic hairdryer. Today, it's back with a slightly smaller and cheaper travel-size version. 
As the name suggests, the $299.99 Supersonic Travel is meant for people on the go - whether that's a business trip or a jaunt to the gym before work. Dyson claims that it's 32 percent smaller, 25 percent lighter, and capable of fitting in purses and carry-on luggage. It uses the same basic tech as the Supersonic, though it now automatically adapts voltage to the country you're in. And folks who already invested in the original Supersonic don't have to worry about buying new  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 戴森推出便携版Supersonic吹风机
zh.summary: 戴森推出了旅行版本的Supersonic吹风机，售价299.99美元，体积小32%，重量轻25%，并具有国际自适应电压功能。溢价定位继续巩固了戴森在高端护发技术中的主导地位。

title: Pentagon pulls the plug on one of the military's most troubled space programs
summary: The Pentagon has terminated a military space program due to critical ground system issues that threatened both military and civilian GPS capabilities. The cancellation reflects broader efforts to address systemic problems in troubled defense space initiatives.
content: Problems with the ground system would have "put current GPS military and civilian capabilities at risk."

zh.title: 五角大楼叫停军方备受困扰的太空计划
zh.summary: 由于严重的地面系统问题威胁到军事和民用GPS能力，五角大楼已终止了一项军事太空计划。这次取消反映了解决防御太空计划中系统性问题的更广泛努力。

title: Who is John Ternus, the incoming Apple CEO?
summary: John Ternus will assume the role of Apple CEO on September 1, taking charge of one of the world's most valuable companies despite remaining relatively unknown outside Apple's core community. The transition marks a significant leadership change at the tech giant.
content: Starting on September 1, Ternus will lead one of the world's most valuable companies, but if you're not a dedicated Apple enthusiast, you've probably never heard of this man, who has largely remained out of the spotlight until now.

zh.title: 谁是苹果新任CEO约翰·特努斯？
zh.summary: 约翰·特努斯将于9月1日接任苹果CEO一职，领导全球最有价值的公司之一，尽管在苹果核心社区之外仍相对鲜为人知。这次交接标志着科技巨头的重大领导层变化。

title: Tim Cook will still be Apple’s Trump whisperer
summary: Tim Cook is transitioning from CEO to Apple's executive chairman but will continue managing the company's political relationships, particularly with President Trump. As executive chairman, Cook will focus on engaging with global policymakers while John Ternus takes over day-to-day operations. This reflects Cook's long history of navigating Apple's complex geopolitical interests.
content:
Though Tim Cook is shedding his CEO title for the role of Apple's executive chairman, it appears he'll keep one of his most important duties: that of the company's Trump whisperer.
"As executive chairman, Cook will assist with certain aspects of the company, including engaging with policymakers around the world," Apple writes in a press release. Translation: he's sticking around to deal with thorny political relationships - in particular the one with President Donald Trump.
Throughout his tenure, Cook has navigated Apple through tricky political terrain. He's had to balance the company's massive business interest in China with US policymak …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 蒂姆·库克仍将担任苹果的特朗普"私语者"
zh.summary: 蒂姆·库克正从CEO职位过渡到苹果执行主席，但将继续管理公司的政治关系，特别是与特朗普总统的关系。作为执行主席，库克将专注于与全球政策制定者接触，而约翰·特纳斯将接管日常运营。这反映了库克在应对苹果复杂地缘政治利益方面的长期历史。
